D11 ComputationalL3 ApplyReference

Chroma Key — Green-Screen Compositing

Threshold the green channel (or saturated-hue distance) to mask out background; broadcast news, weather, and VFX since the 1950s Larry Butler Travelling Matte system

Green is chosen because human skin lacks green and modern Bayer cameras have 2× green pixels (more SNR). Threshold ε measures how green-saturated a pixel must be to count as background. Edge spill (green light bouncing onto subject) is handled by edge despill — a separate post-processing step.

Slide ε (smaller ε = stricter mask).
